title: [Media Law Column] When justice goes live: The impact of live-streaming on courtrooms
description: The entry of cameras into our courts has transformed the courtroom experience for members of the Bar and the Bench, as also for litigants and members of the general public. In Swapnil Tripathi v. Supreme Court of India, the Supreme Court mooted live-streaming as a pilot project in constitutional cases of public importance. The pandemic compelled virtual access as a matter of sheer necessity and without that facility, the court system would have come to a grinding halt. Virtual courts have now co
